basics.name: Ramiro Nicolas Cosa
basics.label: HealthTech Web Developer | Clinical workflows, implementation and product
basics.summary: Kinesiologist with 20+ years of experience in home-based healthcare, clinical coordination and service auditing. Since 2020, I have been building web tools to digitize clinical and operational workflows, combining real healthcare domain knowledge with Next.js, TypeScript, testing, documentation and FHIR. I am looking for HealthTech roles where I can contribute to implementation, functional analysis and software development for real patient-care workflows.

work.name: Web development for products and operations
work.summary: I design and build web products around real operational workflows, focusing on digital health, business rules and operational UX. I work with Next.js and TypeScript, integrating testing, documentation, analytics, data persistence and FHIR standards according to each project's needs.
highlights: Clinical platform for home-based kinesiology with FHIR workflows
Applications with business rules, persistence and time-based states
Automated testing, technical documentation and Vercel deployments

work.name: Alegra Salud
work.position: Home Care Services Coordinator and Clinical Auditor
work.summary: I coordinated home care services, audited clinical delivery and connected patients, families, healthcare professionals and internal teams. I contributed to operational process design and the creation of a palliative care service, managing complex care needs across multidisciplinary teams.
highlights: Coordination of multidisciplinary teams and home care services
Process design and communication with families and professionals

work.name: CIKAF and private clinical practice
work.summary: I treated patients in clinical and sports rehabilitation, including work with high-performance teams. This practice strengthened my ability to assess needs, document progress and adapt treatments in coordination with patients and other professionals.
highlights: Treatment follow-up and patient progress documentation

education.area: Full Stack Open: web development, testing and software architecture
Bachelor's Degree in Kinesiology and Physiotherapy

projects.name: Kinesiologia a Domicilio
projects.description: A lightweight clinical platform and lead-generation website for a home-based kinesiology service. It digitizes inquiries, administrative intake, treatment cycles, visit records and operational communication with families.

projects.name: World Cup 2026 Predictions
projects.description: A family prediction app modeling scoring, persistence, simple authentication and time-based states. It locks and reveals predictions at kickoff and recalculates standings from recorded match results.

projects.name: Tutti Frutti Online
projects.description: A round-based multiplayer word game with configurable categories, server-side validation and shared real-time state. Players join through an invitation while a host manages letters, answers and scoring.

projects.name: Fira Estudio E-commerce
projects.description: An e-commerce product with catalog, cart, stock-aware checkout and Mercado Pago integration. It includes Supabase persistence, webhook processing, transactional emails, analytics and environment-based deployment workflows.
